title: athlete-guardian — realtime broadcast channels
description: Three broadcast channel families: tenant-level for HR + safeguarding dashboards, athlete-level for co-guardians watching a shared roster, user-level for guardians tracking their own guardianship changes.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.guardians
channels.description: Tenant-wide guardian lifecycle stream. Sink for HR + safeguarding dashboards.
channels.notes: Guardian names redacted for minor athletes on this channel.

channels.name: athlete.{athleteId}.guardians
channels.description: Per-athlete guardian activity. Powers the co-guardian roster view.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND (permission `athlete_guardians.view` scoped to athlete OR active guardian for this athlete)

channels.name: user.{userId}.guardianships
channels.description: Per-user guardianship stream — powers the /me/guardianships live widget.
events: PrimaryGuardianChanged (where new primary user_id = userId OR prior primary user_id = userId)
